summary: Phone Input Replacement Testing - CountryAwarePhoneField. Desktop: All features working (flag+prefix selector, placeholder 712345678, helper text, leading zero stripping, country selection). Mobile: MobileBottomSheet country selection BUG - clicking country options does not change the prefix. Staff/Admin login regression: PASS.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile country selection does not work - clicking a country in the MobileBottomSheet does not change the phone prefix. The sheet opens correctly and shows all countries, but selecting one does not update the prefix value.
ui_bugs.root_cause: In MobileBottomSheet.jsx, the same sheetRef is assigned to both the mobile bottom sheet (line 45) and the desktop dropdown (line 89). On mobile, the mousedown handler checks if clicks are inside sheetRef.current, but sheetRef.current points to the hidden desktop dropdown element. This causes clicks inside the mobile sheet to be incorrectly detected as 'outside' clicks, triggering onClose() before the selectCountry callback can execute.
affected_pages: any page using CountryAwarePhoneField on mobile

action_items: FIX MobileBottomSheet.jsx: Use separate refs for mobile and desktop elements, or conditionally assign ref only to the visible element based on viewport width
Alternative fix: Remove the mousedown outside-click handler for mobile since the backdrop already handles closing
critical_code_review_comments: MobileBottomSheet.jsx lines 45 and 89: sheetRef is assigned to both mobile and desktop elements - this causes the outside-click detection to malfunction on mobile

success_rate.frontend: 90% - Desktop fully working, Mobile country selection broken

context_for_next_testing_agent: CountryAwarePhoneField works correctly on desktop (flag+prefix selector, placeholder, helper text, leading zero stripping, country dropdown selection). The MobileBottomSheet has a bug where country selection doesn't work on mobile viewports (<768px). The bug is in MobileBottomSheet.jsx where sheetRef is shared between mobile and desktop elements.

registration_page.flag_prefix_selector: PASS - Shows flag emoji, country code (TZ), and prefix (+255)
registration_page.helper_text: PASS - Shows 'Enter number without the leading 0'
registration_page.desktop_country_selection: PASS - Dropdown opens, selecting country changes prefix
registration_page.mobile_country_selection: FAIL - MobileBottomSheet opens but selecting country does not change prefix

affiliate_payouts_page.phone_field_present: PASS - CountryAwarePhoneField in add payout account form
affiliate_payouts_page.mobile_country_selection: FAIL - Same bug as registration page

partner_dashboard.renders_correctly: PASS - Dashboard loads with KPIs, pipeline, recent assignments
